Class XForwardedRequestHeadersFilter

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.gateway.server.mvc.filter.XForwardedRequestHeadersFilter
All Implemented Interfaces:
BiFunction<org.springframework.http.HttpHeaders, org.springframework.web.servlet.function.ServerRequest, org.springframework.http.HttpHeaders>, HttpHeadersFilter<org.springframework.web.servlet.function.ServerRequest>, HttpHeadersFilter.RequestHttpHeadersFilter, org.springframework.core.Ordered
public class XForwardedRequestHeadersFilter extends Object implements HttpHeadersFilter.RequestHttpHeadersFilter, org.springframework.core.Ordered
